Starlife Advert

Empowering everyday people to grow wealth

Our Mission

Starlife Advert was founded with one goal: to give everyday people access to investment opportunities that were once only available to the wealthy. We believe everyone deserves a chance to grow their money and build a better future.

Why Choose Us

✓2% guaranteed daily profit on all active investments
✓Transparent operations — see every transaction in real time
✓Fast withdrawals processed within 24 hours
✓24/7 support team always ready to assist
✓Shareholder program — earn from $2M annual profit pool

Contact Us

📧 support@starlifeadvert.com
📱 M-Pesa Till: 6034186
💳 PayPal: starlife.payment@starlifeadvert.com
Terms
Privacy
Testimonials

Terms & Conditions

1. Investment Security
Starlife Advert operates a managed investment program. Your principal investment is protected and daily profits of 2% are credited to your balance every day your investment is active. We are committed to the security and growth of every member's funds.

2. Daily Profit
The 2% daily profit rate is our current offering and may be adjusted with 7 days notice to users.

3. Withdrawals
Minimum withdrawal is $10. A 10% processing fee applies. Withdrawals are processed within 24 hours on business days.

4. Referrals
Referral bonuses are paid on the first investment of a referred user only. Fraudulent referrals will result in account termination.

5. Account Suspension
We reserve the right to suspend accounts involved in fraudulent activity, chargebacks, or abuse of our systems.

6. Contact
For disputes contact support@starlifeadvert.com within 30 days of the transaction.

Privacy Policy

Data We Collect
Name, email, phone number, device information, and transaction history.

How We Use It
To operate your account, process transactions, send notifications, and improve our services.

Data Sharing
We do not sell your personal data. We may share with payment processors strictly for transaction purposes.

Security
Your data is stored securely on Google Firebase infrastructure with industry-standard encryption.

Your Rights
You may request deletion of your account and data by emailing support@starlifeadvert.com.
